spotlights.note: Left-side carrying threat and the cleanest route into transition attacks.
Primary line-breaking creator and the best rhythm controller between the lines.
Vertical running and set-piece presence make him a tournament swing player.
Creates overloads wide and changes settled games with 1v1 progression.
Most direct match-winner in open field and still the key final-third runner.
Sets the team tempo and carries the highest creative burden in possession.
Reference point in the box and still the safest finisher in decisive phases.
